neighbors.name: Joseph B. Dover
neighbors.claims: Joseph B. Dover, in his early 80s, has been a Polk County resident for decades ([www.fastbackgroundcheck.com](https://www.fastbackgroundcheck.com/address/476-6th-st/cedartown-ga-30125#:~:text=Records%20www.fastbackgroundcheck.com%20%20,Unit%20R%2C%20Cedartown%20GA%2030125)). He appears to be a private landowner with no public profile or documented involvement in local civic or development issues ([qpublic.net](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/#:~:text=Polk%20County%20with%20a%20web,Polk%20County%20was%20named%20for)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage Mr. Dover through a respectful personal visit, possibly with a long-time local acquaintance, to honor his decades in the community and listen to any concerns he may have about preserving his land legacy.

neighbors.name: Jock E. Stahl & Angella S. Stahl
neighbors.claims: Jock E. Stahl and his wife Angella S. Stahl are listed as co-owners of a parcel in Polk County, according to county property records ([qpublic.net](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/#:~:text=Polk%20County%20with%20a%20web,Polk%20County%20was%20named%20for)). They have not been identified in any public meetings or news related to local development, indicating no known civic engagement on those issues ([qpublic.net](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/#:~:text=Polk%20County%20with%20a%20web,Polk%20County%20was%20named%20for)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach the Stahls together in an informal, neighborly manner at their property, providing clear information about the project and addressing any questions openly to build trust, given their low-profile status in the community.

neighbors.name: Carlos Ortega-Anguiano & Christine D. Ortega-Anguiano
neighbors.claims: Carlos Ortega-Anguiano and his spouse Christine D. Ortega-Anguiano hold title to a Polk County property as reflected in public tax records ([qpublic.net](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/#:~:text=Polk%20County%20with%20a%20web,Polk%20County%20was%20named%20for)). There is no record of either being active in local committees or voicing opinions on development projects in the area ([qpublic.net](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/#:~:text=Polk%20County%20with%20a%20web,Polk%20County%20was%20named%20for)).
neighbors.influence_justification: No known civic roles; private citizens

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out to the Ortega-Anguiano family with a friendly, face-to-face introduction, being prepared to answer any questions about potential impacts and respecting their privacy, since they have not previously engaged on community issues.

overview_summary: All three profiled neighbors are private landowners with no recorded public stance on development. None are known to have significant influence in local affairs. They are generally longstanding community members with low profiles and thus represent low community influence overall.
